015 */
016package org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.peergroup;
017
018import org.consensusj.bitcoin.json.pojo.ChainTip;
019import io.reactivex.rxjava3.processors.PublishProcessor;
020import org.bitcoinj.core.Block;
021import org.bitcoinj.core.Peer;
022import org.bitcoinj.core.PeerGroup;
023import org.bitcoinj.base.Sha256Hash;
024import org.bitcoinj.core.Transaction;
025import org.bitcoinj.core.listeners.BlocksDownloadedEventListener;
026import org.consensusj.bitcoin.rx.RxBlockchainService;
027import org.reactivestreams.Publisher;
028import org.slf4j.Logger;
029import org.slf4j.LoggerFactory;
030
031import java.util.concurrent.CompletableFuture;
032import java.util.concurrent.Executors;
033import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledExecutorService;
034import java.util.concurrent.ScheduledFuture;
035import java.util.concurrent.TimeUnit;
036
037/**
038 * Provide Reactive Publishers for {@link PeerGroup} information.
039 * This implementation works with a PeerGroup w/o a Blockchain/BlockStore.
040 */
041public class RxPeerGroup implements RxBlockchainService {
042    private static final Logger log = LoggerFactory.getLogger(RxPeerGroup.class);
043    private final PeerGroup peerGroup;
044    private static final int initialDelay = 0;
045    private static final int period = 1;
046    
047    private ScheduledExecutorService stpe;
048    // Will never return normally, and will throw an exception upon task
049    // cancellation or abnormal termination of a task execution. Use for cancelling
050    // the ScheduledExecutorService
051    private ScheduledFuture<?> scheduledFuture;
052
053    private int lastHeight = -1;
054    private final PublishProcessor<Transaction> transactionProcessor;
055    private final PublishProcessor<Integer> blockHeightProcessor;
056
057    public RxPeerGroup(PeerGroup peerGroup) {
058        this.peerGroup = peerGroup;
059        this.transactionProcessor = PublishProcessor.create();
060        this.blockHeightProcessor = PublishProcessor.create();
061        //start();   // TODO: See start()
062    }
063
064    /**
065     * TODO: Fix this. RxPeerGroup implements BlockchainService which does not have a {@code start()} method.
066     * But if we move (@code start()} to the constructor, it breaks PeerWatcher.
067     */
068    public void start() {
069        CompletableFuture<?> groupStartedFuture = peerGroup.startAsync();
070
071        // This should be a BehaviorSubject or something that caches the last message
072        blockHeightProcessor.onNext(peerGroup.getMostCommonChainHeight());
073
074        stpe = Executors.newScheduledThreadPool(2);
075        scheduledFuture = stpe.scheduleAtFixedRate(this::updateBlockHeight, initialDelay, period, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
076
077        groupStartedFuture.thenRunAsync(RxPeerGroup::peerGroupStartedListener, stpe);
078
079        peerGroup.addConnectedEventListener(this::onPeerConnected);
080        peerGroup.addDisconnectedEventListener(this::onPeerDisconnected);
081        peerGroup.addOnTransactionBroadcastListener(this::onTransaction);
082    }
083
084    @Override
085    public void close() {
086        if (stpe != null) {
087            if (scheduledFuture != null) {
088                final ScheduledFuture<?> handle = scheduledFuture;
089                Runnable task = () -> handle.cancel(true);
090                stpe.schedule(task, 0, TimeUnit.SECONDS);
091            }
092            stpe.shutdown();
093        }
094        if (peerGroup != null && peerGroup.isRunning()) {
095            peerGroup.stopAsync();
096        }
097    }
098
099    @Override
100    public Publisher<Transaction> transactionPublisher() {
101        return transactionProcessor;
102    }
103
104    @Override
105    public Publisher<Sha256Hash> transactionHashPublisher() {
106        return transactionProcessor.map(Transaction::getTxId);
107    }
108
109    /**
110     * TBD: Can {@link BlocksDownloadedEventListener} be used here?
111     */
112    @Override
113    public Publisher<Block> blockPublisher() {
114        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Not implemented");
115    }
116
117    /**
118     * TBD: Can {@link BlocksDownloadedEventListener} be used here?
119     */
120    @Override
121    public Publisher<Sha256Hash> blockHashPublisher() {
122        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Not implemented");
123    }
124
125    @Override
126    public Publisher<Integer> blockHeightPublisher() {
127        return blockHeightProcessor;
128    }
129
130    @Override
131    public Publisher<ChainTip> chainTipPublisher() {
132        throw new UnsupportedOperationException("Not implemented");
133    }
134
135    private static void peerGroupStartedListener() {
136        log.info("PeerGroup started listener called");
137    }
138
139    private void updateBlockHeight() {
140        int newHeight = getBlockHeight();
141        if (newHeight != lastHeight) {
142            lastHeight = newHeight;
143            blockHeightProcessor.onNext(newHeight);
144        }
145    }
146
147    private int getBlockHeight() {
148        return peerGroup.getMostCommonChainHeight();
149    }
150
151    private void onTransaction(Peer peer, Transaction tx) {
152        log.info("PeerWatcher: Got transaction: {}", tx.getTxId());
153        transactionProcessor.onNext(tx);
154    }
155
156    private void onPeerConnected(Peer peer, int peerCount) {
157        log.info("PeerWatcher: Peer Connected: {}, count: {}", peer.getAddress(), peerCount);
158    }
159
160    private void onPeerDisconnected(Peer peer, int peerCount) {
161        log.info("PeerWatcher: Peer Disconnected, count: {}", peerCount);
162    }
163}
